title: campanula bellidifolia subsp. argunensis
intro: Campanula bellidifolia subsp. argunensis, also known as the mountain bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and treating wounds due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in oil for topical application, or dried for later use in herbal remedies.
